description_long: A young adult woman stands with arms extended horizontally, dressed in a sleeveless cropped vest and matching high-waisted shorts. She wears knee-high socks and sturdy lace-up shoes, complemented by fingerless gloves and a headband tied in a bow. Her outfit features utility-style pockets and a belt, suggesting a practical, urban look. The figure's hair is straight and shoulder-length, partially covered by the headband. The overall appearance is casual yet functional, suitable for active movement in an urban environment. No visible objects are carried, and the attire is accessorized with coordinated gloves and a headband.
description: A young woman in a sleeveless vest and shorts, with knee-high socks, gloves, and a headband, stands with arms outstretched. Her look is casual and practical, suited for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full outfit, headband, gloves, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the vest, shorts, and the straight hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vest, shorts, belt, and the headband's bow.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the clothing and the straight hairstyle.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless cropped vest, high-waisted shorts, knee-high socks, fingerless gloves, headband
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
